Title: Mindset & Resilience Check
Description: Reflect on how you currently respond to setbacks, challenges, and failure — and identify the mindset shifts that will most support your growth.
SchemaJson: {"id":"mindset_check_v1","title":"Mindset and Resilience Check","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"rating","label":"How well do you bounce back after professional setbacks or rejections?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"choice","label":"Which mindset challenge resonates with you most?","options":["Fear of failure holds me back from trying","I take criticism very personally","I give up too easily when things get hard","I compare myself to others too much","I struggle to stay motivated long-term"],"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"rating","label":"How actively do you seek out learning and feedback from your mistakes?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"choice","label":"When you face a significant challenge at work, what is your typical first response?","options":["I look for a solution straight away","I feel overwhelmed but eventually push through","I talk it through with someone","I avoid it and hope it goes away","I feel energised — challenges motivate me"],"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"Describe how you typically respond when things go wrong at work or in your career.","required":false}]}
